documents.title: Email from Customer
documents.body:
From: sarah.bennett@email.com
To: support@homekitchenplus.com
Subject: Problem with Order #HK-7834

Dear Customer Service,

I received my order #HK-7834 yesterday, but there is a problem. I ordered a stainless steel cookware set (item #CS-400), but the box contained a non-stick cookware set (item #NS-400). Also, one of the frying pans has a scratch on the surface. I specifically chose the stainless steel set because I have an induction cooktop, and non-stick pans do not work on it. I need this resolved as soon as possible because I have family visiting next week. Please advise on how to proceed.

Thank you,
Sarah Bennett

documents.title: Reply from Customer Support
documents.body:
From: support@homekitchenplus.com
To: sarah.bennett@email.com
Subject: RE: Problem with Order #HK-7834

Dear Ms. Bennett,

Thank you for contacting us about your order #HK-7834. We apologize for the mix-up. After checking our warehouse records, it appears that item #CS-400 and #NS-400 were accidentally swapped due to similar packaging. We have reserved the correct stainless steel set (item #CS-400) for you, and it will be shipped via express delivery today at no extra charge. You should receive it within two business days. No need to return the incorrect set; you may keep it or donate it to a local charity. If you have any further concerns, please do not hesitate to contact us.

Best regards,
Mike Torres
Home Kitchen Plus Support Team

questions.question: What product did Ms. Bennett originally order?
questions.explanation: 顧客郵件中明確寫道「I ordered a stainless steel cookware set (item #CS-400)」。

questions.question: Why does Ms. Bennett need the correct product urgently?
options: She is moving to a new house
She has family visiting next week
She is selling her old cookware
She needs it for a cooking class
questions.answer: She has family visiting next week
questions.explanation: 顧客郵件寫道「I have family visiting next week」，因此需要盡快解決。

questions.question: How will the correct product be delivered?
options: By express delivery at no extra charge
By customer pickup at the warehouse
By a third-party courier with a fee
questions.answer: By express delivery at no extra charge
questions.explanation: 客服回覆中說明「shipped via express delivery today at no extra charge」。

questions.question: What does the support team ask Ms. Bennett to do with the incorrect set?
options: Ship it back at her own expense
Exchange it at a local store
questions.explanation: 客服回覆明確寫道「you may keep it or donate it to a local charity」。

questions.question: Based on both documents, which item will be included in the replacement shipment?
options: A different model not previously mentioned
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇文件：顧客郵件中說明她訂購的是#CS-400不鏽鋼套組，客服回覆確認已為她保留「the correct stainless steel set (item #CS-400)」，對照兩者可知替換出貨的商品即為顧客原本訂購的#CS-400。

documents.title: Job Posting: Marketing Coordinator
documents.body:
BrightPath Analytics is hiring a Marketing Coordinator for our Boston office.

Responsibilities:
- Manage social media accounts and create weekly content calendars
- Coordinate with the design team on promotional materials
- Track and report on campaign performance metrics
- Assist with event planning for quarterly industry conferences

Requirements:
- Bachelor's degree in Marketing, Communications, or related field
- At least one year of experience in digital marketing
- Proficiency in Google Analytics and Adobe Creative Suite
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

We offer:
- Starting salary: $48,000 - $55,000 based on experience
- Health and dental insurance
- 15 days of paid vacation

To apply, email your resume and portfolio to careers@brightpath.com by April 30.

documents.title: Email: Job Application
documents.body:
From: daniel.lee@email.com
To: careers@brightpath.com
Subject: Application for Marketing Coordinator Position

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to apply for the Marketing Coordinator position at BrightPath Analytics. I hold a Bachelor's degree in Communications from Boston University and have been working as a Social Media Assistant at GreenLeaf Media for the past 18 months. In this role, I managed five client social media accounts, created monthly content calendars, and used Google Analytics to track campaign performance. I am also proficient in Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator.

I have attached my resume and a portfolio of recent campaigns I have worked on. I am available for an interview at your convenience and can start within two weeks of an offer.

Thank you for your consideration.

Sincerely,
Daniel Lee

questions.question: What is the starting salary range for the position?
questions.explanation: 招聘廣告中明確列出「Starting salary: $48,000 - $55,000」。

questions.question: How long has Daniel Lee worked at GreenLeaf Media?
questions.explanation: 應徵信中提到「working as a Social Media Assistant at GreenLeaf Media for the past 18 months」。

questions.question: What is the application deadline?
questions.explanation: 招聘廣告寫明「email your resume and portfolio to careers@brightpath.com by April 30」。

questions.question: What tool does Daniel mention using that is also listed as a requirement in the job posting?
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇文件：招聘廣告要求熟練Google Analytics，應徵信中Daniel提到他在工作中使用Google Analytics追蹤活動成效。

questions.question: Where is the position located?
questions.explanation: 招聘廣告第一句即說明「BrightPath Analytics is hiring a Marketing Coordinator for our Boston office」。

documents.title: Order Confirmation
documents.body:
ORDER CONFIRMATION
Order #: WC-9021
Date: February 18, 2025
Customer: Westfield High School

Items Ordered:
1. Science Lab Tables (Model ST-200) - Qty: 8 - $350 each
2. Lab Stools (Model LS-50) - Qty: 32 - $45 each
3. Storage Cabinets (Model SC-100) - Qty: 4 - $280 each

Subtotal: $5,360
Shipping: $200
Total: $5,560

Estimated delivery: 10-14 business days
Payment method: Purchase Order #PO-45612

Thank you for your order. A shipping confirmation will be sent when your items are dispatched.

documents.title: Shipping Notification
documents.body:
SHIPPING NOTIFICATION
Order #: WC-9021
Date: February 25, 2025

Your order has been shipped in two separate deliveries:

Shipment A (Tracking: 1Z999AA10123456784)
- Science Lab Tables (Model ST-200) - Qty: 8
- Lab Stools (Model LS-50) - Qty: 32
Estimated arrival: March 2, 2025

Shipment B (Tracking: 1Z999AA10123456791)
- Storage Cabinets (Model SC-100) - Qty: 4
Estimated arrival: March 5, 2025

Please note that Shipment B was sent separately due to the size and weight of the storage cabinets. If you have any questions about your delivery, please contact our logistics team at shipping@schoolsupplyco.com or call 1-800-555-0178.

questions.question: What is the total amount of the order?
questions.explanation: 訂單確認中Total欄位為$5,560（含運費$200）。

questions.question: How many lab stools were ordered?
questions.explanation: 訂單確認中Lab Stools數量為32張。

questions.question: Why were the items shipped in two separate deliveries?
options: The storage cabinets are large and heavy
The lab stools were out of stock
The shipping company made an error
questions.answer: The storage cabinets are large and heavy
questions.explanation: 出貨通知說明「Shipment B was sent separately due to the size and weight of the storage cabinets」。

questions.question: What is the unit price of one storage cabinet?
questions.explanation: 此題須參照訂單確認：Storage Cabinets單價為$280。出貨通知未提及價格，故只需看訂單確認即可。

questions.question: Which items will arrive earlier according to the shipping notification?
options: Science Lab Tables and Lab Stools
questions.answer: Science Lab Tables and Lab Stools
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇文件：出貨通知顯示Shipment A（實驗桌+凳子）預計3月2日到，Shipment B（儲物櫃）預計3月5日到；訂單確認可確認這些品項屬於同一個訂單WC-9021。

documents.title: Meeting Request Email
documents.body:
From: thomas.grant@buildright.com
To: laura.chen@buildright.com
Subject: Project Phoenix - Kickoff Meeting Request

Dear Laura,

I would like to schedule a kickoff meeting for Project Phoenix. The client has asked us to present the initial design concepts by the end of next week, so we need to align our team quickly. I suggest we meet on Thursday, March 6, at 2:00 PM in Conference Room 3B. I have already checked the room booking system, and it is available at that time.

The agenda will include: reviewing the client brief, assigning tasks to team members, and setting milestones for the next four weeks. Please let me know if this time works for you and if there is anything else you would like to add to the agenda.

Best,
Thomas Grant
Project Manager

documents.title: Reply: Meeting Confirmation
documents.body:
From: laura.chen@buildright.com
To: thomas.grant@buildright.com
Subject: RE: Project Phoenix - Kickoff Meeting Request

Hi Thomas,

Thursday, March 6 at 2:00 PM works perfectly for me. I will prepare the client brief and have the initial budget figures ready to present. I would also like to add a discussion item about the material sourcing timeline, as we may face delays with the steel supplier.

One note: Conference Room 3B does not have a projector. Since we will be reviewing design concepts, I recommend we switch to Conference Room 2A, which has full AV equipment and can seat up to 10 people. I have taken the liberty of booking Room 2A from 2:00 PM to 3:30 PM on March 6. Please confirm this change is acceptable.

Thanks,
Laura Chen
Lead Designer

questions.question: What is the main purpose of the meeting?
options: To kick off Project Phoenix and align the team
questions.answer: To kick off Project Phoenix and align the team
questions.explanation: Thomas的郵件主旨和第一句即說明這是一場「kickoff meeting for Project Phoenix」。

questions.question: Why does Laura suggest changing the meeting room?
options: Room 3B does not have a projector
questions.answer: Room 3B does not have a projector
questions.explanation: Laura的回信中提到「Conference Room 3B does not have a projector」。

questions.question: What does Laura plan to present at the meeting?
options: The client brief and initial budget figures
questions.answer: The client brief and initial budget figures
questions.explanation: Laura的回信寫道「I will prepare the client brief and have the initial budget figures ready to present」。

questions.question: What additional topic does Laura want to discuss?
questions.explanation: Laura提到想增加「a discussion item about the material sourcing timeline」。

questions.question: What time frame did Laura reserve for Room 2A?
questions.explanation: 此題須參照兩篇：Thomas原訂2:00 PM開會（訂單一），Laura預訂了Room 2A「from 2:00 PM to 3:30 PM」（文件二），對照可知會議時間為2:00-3:30。

documents.title: Email: Travel Approval Request
documents.body:
From: emma.wilson@meridiancorp.com
To: robert.chen@meridiancorp.com
Subject: Travel to Chicago Client Meeting

Dear Robert,

I am requesting approval to travel to Chicago for a meeting with Horizon Financial on May 12 and 13. I will depart on May 11 and return on May 14. The estimated costs are as follows:

- Round-trip flight: $420
- Hotel (3 nights at $180/night): $540
- Meals and local transportation: $200
- Total estimated: $1,160

I have attached the meeting agenda. Please let me know if you have any questions.

Regards,
Emma Wilson
Senior Account Manager

documents.title: Reply: Travel Approval with Notes
documents.body:
From: robert.chen@meridiancorp.com
To: emma.wilson@meridiancorp.com
Subject: RE: Travel to Chicago Client Meeting

Hi Emma,

Your travel request is approved, but I have a few notes. First, per our updated travel policy, the hotel budget is capped at $150 per night. Please find a hotel within that range and send me the updated estimate. The flight and meal budgets are fine.

Second, please make sure to submit your expense report within five business days of returning. Also, since Horizon Financial is a key account, I would like you to prepare a summary of the meeting outcomes for the executive team by May 16.

Safe travels,
Robert Chen
Regional Director

questions.question: What is the main purpose of Emma's trip to Chicago?
questions.explanation: Emma的郵件第一句即說明「travel to Chicago for a meeting with Horizon Financial」。

questions.question: What is the hotel budget limit per night according to Robert?
questions.explanation: Robert回覆中寫道「per our updated travel policy, the hotel budget is capped at $150 per night」。

questions.question: By when must Emma submit her expense report?
options: Within two business days of returning
Within five business days of returning
Within seven business days of returning
Within ten business days of returning
questions.answer: Within five business days of returning
questions.explanation: Robert的回信要求「submit your expense report within five business days of returning」。

questions.question: What does Robert ask Emma to do by May 16?
options: Prepare a meeting summary for the executive team
questions.answer: Prepare a meeting summary for the executive team
questions.explanation: Robert要求「prepare a summary of the meeting outcomes for the executive team by May 16」。

questions.question: How much of Emma's original hotel estimate exceeds the company policy?
questions.explanation: 此題須同時參照兩篇文件：Emma的郵件中酒店預算為$180/晚，Robert的回覆規定上限為$150/晚，兩者相差$30/晚。
